title: DALEX NonTox PAGE Stain
author: David Frommholz
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.v42e8ye

steps.title: Remove the gel from the cassette...
steps.instruction: Remove the gel from the cassette and place it into a tray e.g. a weighing pan. Immerse the gel in distilled water (50 ml for an 8 x 8 cm gel) and microwave for 30 s at 500 W. Incubate with gentle shaking for 5 minutes and discard the water afterwards. Repeat two more times. 00:05:00 Native PAGE gels do not require washing because they do not contain SDS. In this case you can skip the washing step.

steps.title: Add enough DALEX NonTox PAGE Stain...
steps.instruction: Add enough DALEX NonTox PAGE Stain to completely cover the gel ( 25 ml for an 8 x 8 cm gel). Microwave for 10 s at 500 W. 00:00:10

steps.title: Incubate with gentle swirling or rocking...
steps.instruction: Incubate with gentle swirling or rocking for at least 15 minutes or until the desired stainig intensity is reached.

steps.title: Pour off the stainging solution and...
steps.instruction: Pour off the stainging solution and rinse the gel with water twice. To increase the contrast of the gel, the background can be reduced by washing the gel in water and heating in a microwave as described in step 1.
